name: Brown Sugar Ginger Snaps
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Butter, unsalted at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and brown sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in the egg yolk, vanilla extract, and chopped crystallized ginger.
3. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. Gradually combine the sifted dry ingredients with the wet ingredients.
5. If needed, chill the dough in the refrigerator for about 30 minutes to make it easier to handle.
6. Roll out the dough on a floured surface and cut into shapes using cookie cutters.
7. Place the cookies on an ungreased baking sheet.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10-12 minutes, or until golden brown.
